nodes.label: tactus_socket.scad — self-adjusting driver socket (coupling-physics core)
nodes.rationale: Solves the optimal-pressure / goes-invisible problem: too loose -> cone moves air (heard not felt); too tight -> cone clamped (also invisible); sweet spot -> moderate floating preload. Socket grips the driver precisely (rigid mm-tolerance bore) while the skin side couples through a compliant foam/TPU pad so the contact button floats to the sweet-spot preload across a range of fits. Rigid where it meets the speaker, springy where it meets the body. Shared via use <tactus_socket.scad> by the chest plate and node mount.

nodes.label: driver_socket(dia,depth,mag_dia,fit,foam,rim,wall) — parametric grip socket
nodes.rationale: z=0 = skin side; driver loads from the back, cone faces out. socket_id = dia + fit(0.6) precise grip bore. socket_h = depth + foam(6) + rim(2.2). Front rim aperture lets cone/button poke through to the body. Back well (mag_dia+2) clears magnet and seats a compliant foam disc. Wire-exit slot sized for 18 AWG zip-cord. 3 grip-relief slots at 0/120/240 so the bore flexes a hair onto the driver. Reused by chest plate socket_at() and node-mount barrel().

nodes.label: contact_button(btn_dia,proud) — skin-contact dome
nodes.rationale: Glue base (1.6mm) bonds to the driver dust cap; skin dome (proud=2.5) stands proud so it floats into the body at the sweet-spot preload. Printed standalone (x12+) since the barrel already contains the socket.

nodes.label: socket_outer_d(dia,fit,wall) — socket OD helper function
nodes.rationale: Returns dia + fit + 2*wall so plates/barrels can space and size around sockets correctly. Consumed cross-file by chest plate (sock_od) and node mount (sock_od, bar_od).
